name: Entra ID security defaults not enabled
description: Microsoft Entra ID Security Defaults are disabled. Security Defaults enforce MFA for all users, block legacy authentication protocols, and protect privileged actions — providing a baseline of identity security at no extra cost.
remediation: Enable Security Defaults in Entra ID: Azure Portal → Entra ID → Properties → Manage security defaults → Enable. Note: Security Defaults cannot coexist with Conditional Access policies. Prefer Conditional Access for fine-grained control in E3/E5 tenants.
